case_title: MOSK, MILTON J. vs. BENTLEY, CHRISTIAN et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BENTLEY, CHRISTIAN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 466 14TH ST #10, LEASE FORFEITED, NOTATION DONE ON ORIGINAL INSTRUMENT PER C.R.C. 522 INCLUDES ALL TENANTS, SUBTENANTS, NAMED CLAIMANTS, AND OTHER OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES PER C.C.P. 415.46.
AMENDED REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $238.25 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT BENTLEY, CHRISTIAN
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT SERVED MAY-25-1996, PRE-JUDGEMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 5, INCLUSIVE
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS FILED BY PLAINTIFF MOSK, MILTON J. AS TO DEFENDANT BENTLEY, CHRISTIAN
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT BENTLEY, CHRISTIAN

EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT BENTLEY, CHRISTIAN
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $17.87 FILED BY PLAINTIFF MOSK, MILTON J.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MOSK, MILTON J. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BENTLEY, CHRISTIAN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: RESTORED TO PLAINTIFF ON 06/26/96 $2,055.02 RENT, $485.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $238.25 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,778.27, LEASE FORFEITED
